steps.t: Cíllan is at the refugees' camp outside of Harwick. You should find Cíllan and see how she fares.
Someone in Harwick must deal with the acquisition of houses in the city. You should speak with people in Harwick who may have homes for sale, so that …
Cíllan is waiting in the refugee camp outside Harwick to find out if there are any houses available for purchase in Harwick. You should tell Cíllan ev…
